name: for_chars_symbols
description: Characters, symbols, native emojis and typography helpers picker for TinyMCE (FriendsOfREDAXO)

scripts.build-copy: mkdir -p ../../assets/scripts/tinymce/plugins/ && cp -r dist/for_chars_symbols/ ../../assets/scripts/tinymce/plugins/for_chars_symbols/ && mkdir -p ../../assets/vendor/tinymce/plugins/ && cp -r dist/for_chars_symbols/ ../../assets/vendor/tinymce/plugins/for_chars_symbols/

author: FriendsOfREDAXO
